title: Chubb Report Offers Insight on Mindset of the Wealthy, Their Passions and Protecting What Matters
text: Top-of-mind concerns include climate-related property damage, economic instability and potential for ruinous lawsuits WHITEHOUSE STATION, N.J. , Dec. 19, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- A new survey from Chubb finds that more than three-quarters of wealthy Americans and Canadians believe damage from severe weather stemming from climate change poses the biggest threat to their home.

title: Chubb Appoints Federico Spagnoli to Lead Consumer Lines for its International General Insurance Operations
text: Experienced executive to focus on optimizing full strength of Chubb's consumer insurance offering across international markets NEW YORK , Dec. 12, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Chubb today announced that Federico Spagnoli has been appointed Division President, Consumer Lines for Overseas General Insurance, the company's international general insurance operations. He joins Chubb from Prudential Financial, where he served as Chief Executive Officer of Fully Ecosystem, a wellness fintech venture.

title: Chubb and Wharton Executive Education Train the Next Generation of High-Net-Worth Focused Agents and Brokers
text: 48 Agents Earn Certified Advisor of Personal Insurance Designation WHITEHOUSE STATION, N.J. , Dec. 7, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Chubb today announced that 48 high-performing insurance agents and brokers have earned the Certified Advisor of Personal Insurance (CAPI) designation following the successful completion of a comprehensive educational curriculum created in collaboration with the Aresty Institute of Executive Education at the Wharton School of the University of Pennsylvania.

title: Chubb and NetSPI Launch Cyber Protection Partnership
text: Chubb leverages NetSPI's technology to help policyholders go on the offensive against cyber threats WHITEHOUSE STATION, N.J. , Dec. 5, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Chubb, the world's largest publicly traded property & casualty insurance company, has announced an innovative collaboration with NetSPI, a global leader in proactive security, to strengthen clients' cyber-risk profile via enhanced attack surface management and penetration testing solutions.
